title: pityrogramma tartarea var. ornithopteris
intro: Pityrogramma tartarea var. ornithopteris, also known as the bird wing fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Polynesia, due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve pain. The health benefits of Pityrogramma tartarea var. ornithopteris include reducing inflammation and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or tonics that promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
